headline: Support surfaces now recede one step further: My Trips gets the same quieter entry treatment, the launch bar can settle into a softer rest state, and note prompts wait longer before appearing.
notes: Treats My Trips like a primary entry surface so support prompts wait longer and the opening read stays focused on saved routes first.
Adds a softer launch-bar rest state after the first settle so build context remains reachable without feeling like a persistent top layer.
Shortens and lightens the footer support rail copy and density another step while keeping Build notes and Send note reachable.
